Backup.name: Backup
Backup.description: Grants permission to start a backup job for an existing file system

ClientMount.name: ClientMount
ClientMount.description: Grants permission to allow an NFS client read-access to a file system

ClientRootAccess.name: ClientRootAccess
ClientRootAccess.description: Grants permission to allow an NFS client root-access to a file system

ClientWrite.name: ClientWrite
ClientWrite.description: Grants permission to allow an NFS client write-access to a file system

CreateAccessPoint.name: CreateAccessPoint
CreateAccessPoint.description: Grants permission to create an access point for the specified file system

CreateFileSystem.name: CreateFileSystem
CreateFileSystem.description: Grants permission to create a new, empty file system

CreateMountTarget.name: CreateMountTarget
CreateMountTarget.description: Grants permission to create a mount target for a file system

CreateReplicationConfiguration.name: CreateReplicationConfiguration
CreateReplicationConfiguration.description: Grants permission to create a new replication configuration

CreateTags.name: CreateTags
CreateTags.description: Grants permission to create or overwrite tags associated with a file system; deprecated, see TagResource

DeleteAccessPoint.name: DeleteAccessPoint
DeleteAccessPoint.description: Grants permission to delete the specified access point

DeleteFileSystem.name: DeleteFileSystem
DeleteFileSystem.description: Grants permission to delete a file system, permanently severing access to its contents

DeleteFileSystemPolicy.name: DeleteFileSystemPolicy
DeleteFileSystemPolicy.description: Grants permission to delete the resource-level policy for a file system

DeleteMountTarget.name: DeleteMountTarget
DeleteMountTarget.description: Grants permission to delete the specified mount target

DeleteReplicationConfiguration.name: DeleteReplicationConfiguration
DeleteReplicationConfiguration.description: Grants permission to delete a replication configuration

DeleteTags.name: DeleteTags
DeleteTags.description: Grants permission to delete the specified tags from a file system; deprecated, see UntagResource

DescribeAccessPoints.name: DescribeAccessPoints
DescribeAccessPoints.description: Grants permission to view the descriptions of Amazon EFS access points

DescribeAccountPreferences.name: DescribeAccountPreferences
DescribeAccountPreferences.description: Grants permission to view the account preferences in effect for an account

DescribeBackupPolicy.name: DescribeBackupPolicy
DescribeBackupPolicy.description: Grants permission to view the BackupPolicy object for an Amazon EFS file system

DescribeFileSystemPolicy.name: DescribeFileSystemPolicy
DescribeFileSystemPolicy.description: Grants permission to view the resource-level policy for an Amazon EFS file system

DescribeFileSystems.name: DescribeFileSystems
DescribeFileSystems.description: Grants permission to view the description of an Amazon EFS file system specified by file system CreationToken or FileSystemId; or to view the description of all file systems owned by the caller's AWS account in the AWS region of the endpoint that is being called

DescribeLifecycleConfiguration.name: DescribeLifecycleConfiguration
DescribeLifecycleConfiguration.description: Grants permission to view the LifecycleConfiguration object for an Amazon EFS file system

DescribeMountTargetSecurityGroups.name: DescribeMountTargetSecurityGroups
DescribeMountTargetSecurityGroups.description: Grants permission to view the security groups in effect for a mount target

DescribeMountTargets.name: DescribeMountTargets
DescribeMountTargets.description: Grants permission to view the descriptions of all mount targets, or a specific mount target, for a file system

DescribeReplicationConfigurations.name: DescribeReplicationConfigurations
DescribeReplicationConfigurations.description: Grants permission to view the description of an Amazon EFS replication configuration specified by FileSystemId; or to view the description of all replication configurations owned by the caller's AWS account in the AWS region of the endpoint that is being called

DescribeTags.name: DescribeTags
DescribeTags.description: Grants permission to view the tags associated with a file system

ListTagsForResource.name: ListTagsForResource
ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to view the tags associated with the specified Amazon EFS resource

ModifyMountTargetSecurityGroups.name: ModifyMountTargetSecurityGroups
ModifyMountTargetSecurityGroups.description: Grants permission to modify the set of security groups in effect for a mount target

PutAccountPreferences.name: PutAccountPreferences
PutAccountPreferences.description: Grants permission to set the account preferences of an account

PutBackupPolicy.name: PutBackupPolicy
PutBackupPolicy.description: Grants permission to enable or disable automatic backups with AWS Backup by creating a new BackupPolicy object

PutFileSystemPolicy.name: PutFileSystemPolicy
PutFileSystemPolicy.description: Grants permission to apply a resource-level policy that defines the actions allowed or denied from given actors for the specified file system

PutLifecycleConfiguration.name: PutLifecycleConfiguration
PutLifecycleConfiguration.description: Grants permission to enable lifecycle management by creating a new LifecycleConfiguration object

ReplicationRead.name: ReplicationRead
ReplicationRead.description: Grants permission to read file system data for replication

ReplicationWrite.name: ReplicationWrite
ReplicationWrite.description: Grants permission to replicate data to a file system

Restore.name: Restore
Restore.description: Grants permission to start a restore job for a backup of a file system

TagResource.name: TagResource
TagResource.description: Grants permission to create or overwrite tags associated with the specified Amazon EFS resource

UntagResource.name: UntagResource
UntagResource.description: Grants permission to delete the specified tags from an Amazon EFS resource

UpdateFileSystem.name: UpdateFileSystem
UpdateFileSystem.description: Grants permission to update the throughput mode or the amount of provisioned throughput of an existing file system

UpdateFileSystemProtection.name: UpdateFileSystemProtection
UpdateFileSystemProtection.description: Grants permission to update the file system protection of an existing file system

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.name: aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}
aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair that is allowed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.name: aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}
aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair of a resource

aws:TagKeys.name: aws:TagKeys
aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by a list of tag keys that are allowed in the request

elasticfilesystem:AccessPointArn.name: elasticfilesystem:AccessPointArn
elasticfilesystem:AccessPointArn.description: Filters access by the ARN of the access point used to mount the file system

elasticfilesystem:AccessedViaMountTarget.name: elasticfilesystem:AccessedViaMountTarget
elasticfilesystem:AccessedViaMountTarget.description: Filters access by whether the file system is accessed via mount targets

elasticfilesystem:CreateAction.name: elasticfilesystem:CreateAction
elasticfilesystem:CreateAction.description: Filters access by the name of a resource-creating API action

elasticfilesystem:Encrypted.name: elasticfilesystem:Encrypted
elasticfilesystem:Encrypted.description: Filters access by whether users can create only encrypted or unencrypted file systems
